title: cirsium × lojkae
intro: Cirsium × lojkae, also known as Lojka's thistle, is a hybrid plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) derived from the cross between Cirsium heterophyllum and Cirsium pannonicum. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lojka's thistle include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Cirsium × lojkae, such as infusions and tinctures, have been used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
